---
title: "About the Authors"
---

Katie Rosenberg is a parent and school librarian in Knoxville, TN.

Joshua Rosenberg is a parent and a faculty member in the College of Education, Health, and Human Sciences at the University of Tennessee, Knoxville.

---

*Little Kids, Big Adventures: A Guide to Family Hikes Around Knoxville* will be published in 2026 by the University of Tennessee Press.

[← Back to Home](index.qmd)
